name: Landing page in 5 days
tagline: One page that sells one thing. Live in 5 days.
deliverables: One-page site: copy, design, build, deploy
Mobile-first, fast, SEO basics done
Your booking or checkout link wired in
You own the domain and the code
ideal: A business that needs one page that sells: an offer, a menu, a booking link.

name: MVP web app in 5 days
tagline: Your app idea, working in the real world. Live in 5 days.
deliverables: One core workflow, built end to end
Auth, database, and deploy included
Source code handed over with a Loom walkthrough
One round of revisions in week one
ideal: A founder or operator who needs the first working version, not a spec.

name: AI Reception Pilot
tagline: 24/7 AI receptionist on your existing number. Live in 7 days.
deliverables: Voice agent on a forwarded number (you keep your main line)
Configured for your top 10 FAQs, booking flow, escalation rules
Multilingual coverage (JP / KR / EN out of the box)
Loom walkthrough + admin login + 30 days of tuning
Written 90-day ROI memo (the audit, baked in)
5/5 stars or full refund. No fine print.
ideal: Hotels, dive ops, restaurants, professional services. Anyone losing money to missed calls.

name: AI Workflow Build
tagline: One end-to-end AI workflow shipped. Fixed price, fixed timeline.
deliverables: Scoped, designed, built, deployed
Source code or n8n flows handed over
30 days of post-launch support
15% revshare on net new revenue (24 months, capped at $50k)
ideal: Operators who shipped Reception and know which workflow to ship next.

name: Fractional AI Engineer
tagline: Anchor on retainer. Pause any week.
deliverables: Slack channel access
Weekly async standup
All builds shipped that month
Pause or cancel any week
ideal: Businesses that need AI work continuously, not one-off projects.

name: AnchorScan
tagline: Free 5-minute AI diagnostic for any business URL.
deliverables: 1-page programmatic diagnostic
Top 3 AI workflow opportunities for your business
Annual dollar-impact estimate per workflow
Direct path to the AI Reception Pilot if it fits
ideal: Operators not yet sure what AI can do for them.
